name: Tievolu - Managed Services
notes:
Tievolu is an European Internet Carrier specializing in next-generation DDoS Protection and high-performance network services.

We offer a wide range of carrier-grade solutions, including:

- IP Transit
- DDoS Protection
- Cloud Firewall
- Wavelengths
- L2 Transit
- TievoluIX (Internet Exchange)
- Consulting Services
- Network Monitoring

We are open to peering at the following Internet Exchanges:

- TievoluIX
- LOCIX FRA
- GNM-IX

Private Network Interconnects (PNIs) are also available at our interconnection facilities.

📧 Sales: sales@tievolu.net

📞 Phone: +49 3727 5999460

🤝 Peering Requests: peering@tievolu.net
